art.summary: As of March 22, 2026, the Outsider Art Fair in New York concludes, highlighting the late Sam Doyle. Several major exhibitions, including Jeff Wall at MOCA Toronto, also close today.
art.notable: Sam Doyle's 'Dr. Bus Ha.Lo.' potentially set a new price record at $85,000. Attention is shifting to Art Basel Hong Kong (March 25-29) and upcoming exhibitions by Georg Baselitz.

market.summary: Markets remain closed for the weekend after a fourth consecutive week of declines. Key indices, including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, retreated amid geopolitical tensions and energy concerns.

stats.Outlook: Volatility expected for Monday; market focus remains on Middle East developments and inflation indices.
